hero.subtitle: A family-run eco-homestay in the heart of Agra. Real home-cooked food, a host who cares, and a terrace that turns golden at sunrise.

rooms.heading: Choose Your
rooms.subtitle: Five room types for every traveller — private flats, couples, families, and solo backpackers. All include free WiFi, filtered water, and Aneesh & Bhavna's signature hospitality.
rooms.notSureTitle: Not sure which room is right for you?
rooms.notSureSubtitle: WhatsApp Aneesh directly and he'll recommend the best option for your group size and budget.
rooms.pageSubtitle: Four room types for every traveller — from dorm beds to a private 2BHK flat. All include free WiFi, filtered water, and Aneesh & Bhavna's signature hospitality. Book direct — no OTA commission.

facilitiesPage.heading: Everything You
facilitiesPage.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Every stay at VMP Villa comes with these facilities as standard. Because a good host makes you feel welcome, not nickel-and-dimed.
facilitiesPage.coreSub: Included in every room, every night.
facilitiesPage.alsoSub: On request or as part of the stay.
facilitiesPage.ecoSub: VMP Villa is committed to responsible hospitality. Every decision — from the toiletries we stock to the energy we use — is made with the environment in mind.
facilitiesPage.e0d: Shared space with books & board games

roomContent.2bhk-flat-desc: A fully self-contained 2BHK apartment — ideal for families, groups, or extended stays. Features two air-conditioned bedrooms each with an attached private bathroom and separate balcony, a spacious dining area, and a fully equipped kitchen. Complete privacy, just like home.
roomContent.1bhk-flat-desc: A self-contained 1BHK apartment with a beautifully furnished AC bedroom, private attached bathroom, and a dedicated balcony. Comes with a fully equipped modular kitchen — gas stove, chimney, sink, and all utensils — plus a separate dining area. Perfect for couples or solo travellers on extended stays.
roomContent.deluxe-ac-desc: Spacious and well-appointed with a king bed, private en-suite bathroom, and warm décor inspired by Mughal heritage. Features tufted headboard, marble flooring, orange accent chairs, and artwork sourced from local Agra artisans.
roomContent.standard-ac-desc: Comfortable and clean with twin or double bed configuration. Perfect for budget-conscious travellers who don't want to compromise on comfort.
roomContent.dormitory-desc: Social sleeping for solo backpackers and budget explorers. Meet fellow Taj enthusiasts, share stories on the rooftop terrace.

ecostory.heading: A home built on
ecostory.p1: Aneesh and Bhavna started VMP Villa with a simple idea — give every guest the same warmth their own family would receive. Ten years on, that mission also includes taking care of the planet they'll pass on to their children.
ecostory.p2: From rainwater harvesting to solar lighting, organic kitchen gardens to plastic-free rooms — every choice at VMP Villa is made with intention. Green travel shouldn't mean compromising on comfort.

footer.tagline: A family-run eco-homestay in Agra where every guest is treated as family. 6 km from the Taj Mahal East Gate. A lifetime from the ordinary.
